name: Shin Manreal
headline: Recruiting Operations Leader Building Python Automation Tools
subheadline: I combine 10+ years of talent acquisition experience with Python, AI, automation, and recruiting systems to build practical tools that improve hiring speed, data quality, and operational efficiency.
about: I am a Talent Acquisition and Recruiting Operations Leader with 10+ years of experience building scalable hiring functions across healthcare, real estate, e-commerce, and startup environments.
I have filled 200+ roles, reduced average time-to-fill by up to 60%, improved quality of hire by 45%, and managed 60+ active requisitions across multiple business functions.
My technical focus is building Python-powered recruiting tools, workflow automations, AI screening systems, dashboards, ATS processes, and data-driven hiring operations.
highlights: Filled 200+ positions across healthcare, real estate, e-commerce, and startup organizations.
Reduced average time-to-fill by up to 60%.
Managed 60+ active requisitions across multiple business functions.
Built HR and Talent Acquisition functions from scratch.
Led recruiting teams and KPI-driven performance systems.
Implemented ATS, automation, and scalable recruiting operations.

projects.title: AI Hiring Engine
projects.description: A Python and Streamlit recruiting platform designed to centralize candidate management, resume parsing, AI screening, interview script generation, and recruiting workflows.

projects.title: Airtable to RecruitCRM Sync Tool
projects.description: A Python API integration that syncs candidate ratings, AI interview links, interview summaries, and custom fields between Airtable and RecruitCRM.

projects.title: Recruiting Knowledge Base Generator
projects.description: A Python workflow that converts client recruiting data from Excel files into structured, GPT-readable knowledge for AI-powered hiring tools.

projects.title: AI Interview Evaluation System
projects.description: A structured AI evaluation workflow that analyzes resumes, client requirements, and interview transcripts to support recruiter decision-making.

skills.title: Python Development
skills.description: Building automation scripts, Streamlit apps, recruiting tools, data workflows, dashboards, and internal business systems.

skills.title: Recruiting Operations
skills.description: Talent acquisition strategy, full-cycle recruiting, workforce planning, pipeline management, recruitment analytics, and KPI tracking.

skills.title: AI Workflow Tools
skills.description: AI screening, interview evaluation, resume parsing, prompt systems, candidate scoring, and AI-assisted recruiting workflows.

skills.title: API Integrations
skills.description: Connecting Airtable, RecruitCRM, Supabase, ATS platforms, CRMs, Google tools, and external REST APIs.

skills.title: ATS & HR Systems
skills.description: Greenhouse, Rippling, Workable, Loxo, Deel, Manatal, Crelate, ATS implementation, and scalable hiring workflows.

skills.title: Automation & Process Design
skills.description: Zapier, GoHighLevel, Google Apps Script, process optimization, workflow design, SOPs, and scalable recruiting systems.

Managed 60+ active requisitions across multiple departments.

Developed KPI frameworks to improve recruiter performance and accountability.
Standardized sourcing and interviewing processes across teams.
Managed executive operations supporting business efficiency and leadership productivity.

Managed recruitment and onboarding of event staff.
